hypothesis: On GER40 M5 during the Frankfurt+London cash open (08:00-11:00 CET / 07:00-10:00 UTC), a close beyond the prior 30-bar Donchian high/low by >= 0.3*ATR with expanding ATR (ATR now > 1.1 * ATR 20 bars ago) captures directional momentum with positive expectancy at 2R.
falsification: SANITY FIRST: before full backtest, log bars_loaded, session_eligible_bars, donchian_signal_bars, post_filter_bars.
